Standalone PQC Testing
NO AUTOSAR Integration

span.p:
ML-KEM-768 Tests:
• KeyGen 1000 iter
• Encaps 1000 iter
• Decaps 1000 iter
• Rejection sampling
• Buffer overflow detection

span.p:
ML-DSA-65 Tests:
• KeyGen 1000 iter
• Sign 5 sizes × 1000 iter
• Verify 5 sizes × 1000 iter
• Bitflip EUF-CMA 50 bitflips
• Bitflip SUF-CMA 50 bitflips
• Context string testing
